full_text:
Shan Tao 山濤
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shan Tao (山濤)was born in He Nei [河内]. One of the Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove. He was the only Sage involved in politics. Shan Tao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Shan Tao lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
